claim_boundary: Computational dual-receptor Docking-geometry surrogate evidence only; not binding probability, affinity, experimental blocking, Docking Gold, expression, purity, or final submission evidence.
failure_boundary: Any change to the reviewed freeze, any reviewed file, either external dependency, checkpoint/result bytes, Graph/L1 inputs, schema profile, score/rank logic, thresholds, or publication gates invalidates this approval.

This approval does not authorize L1 recomputation, training, truth/teacher/Docking/contact access, downstream C2 reranking, Top7500 publication, or production promotion beyond the canonical Graph/L1/B terminal.
Partial B output or any failed gate must not publish the canonical terminal.
scope: Approve remote execution of the exact frozen Top150K V3.1 B-only four-seed inference recovery and terminal validation/publication only.

verified_closures.b_only_execution: Existing Graph and L1 are reused byte-exactly; launcher invokes only four-seed B inference and does not invoke L1 inference or training.
verified_closures.checkpoint_profile: Exactly seeds 43, 917, 1931, 3253 with frozen checkpoint/result hashes, schema, lane, split, BASE variant, head config, state signature, tensor count, parameter count, frozen-test=0, and contact-disabled profile.
verified_closures.graph_preflight_to_publish: graph_cache_receipt_v2.json, graph_cache_v2.npz, and graph_manifest_v2.tsv are regular non-symlink files; cache and manifest SHA256 must match receipt.outputs at preflight and publish; all three preflight hashes must remain byte-identical.
verified_closures.input_access_firewall: No teacher, truth, Docking pose, contact supervision, candidate ID, or parent ID is forwarded as a model input.
verified_closures.numeric_and_geometry: All prediction numeric fields are finite; each checkpoint R_dual_min and ensemble exact-min are definitionally closed.
verified_closures.old_failure_evidence: The prior V2 schema rejection log is required and byte-bound before B; its bytes must remain unchanged through publish.
verified_closures.prediction_header: The ordered prediction header must exactly equal the frozen checkpoint-count-specific header; extra truth, label, or numeric columns are rejected.
verified_closures.prediction_rows: Exactly 150000 rows; manifest and prediction candidate_id, sequence_sha256, sequence, parent_framework_cluster, and order are identical.
verified_closures.publication: All gates run before publication; versioned and canonical terminal writes are atomic per file and refuse existing targets; failure leaves canonical terminal absent.
verified_closures.schema_allowlist: The V2.11 schema is added only after exact four-checkpoint/result profile validation and is restored in finally.
